title: athyrium × meghalaicum
intro: Athyrium × meghalaicum, a hybrid of the Athyrium filix-femina and Athyrium yokoscense, is a type of fern native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium × meghalaicum are said to include reduced inflammation and improved overall well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of the plant have been used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although the exact methods and dosages are not well-documented.
